name: @chbrain/khai-engine-attachment
description: khai engine content, the attachment domain: attachment as process, how a persona seeks or gives up on closeness to a secure base under threat.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Attachment as process: how a persona seeks or gives up on closeness to a secure base under threat -- secure, anxious, avoidant, or disorganized, set by how the base has answered.

card.wire: Attaches at Process. The root (process_attachment.md) declares attachment as a system that activates under threat: the persona reaches for a secure base, and the history of being answered shapes the reach.
card.issue: Four strategies a persona may run: secure, anxious, avoidant, and disorganized. Each is a process file composed under the root, so the move toward closeness follows the record of how the base answered. The strategy holds until the figure or the history changes.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. The link: each persona links, under Projection, the specific attachment strategy it runs.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links a real attachment strategy. Whether the strategy is true to the persona's history is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. Then give the persona its read under Projection, linking the specific strategy. Read it in the first beat; the room enacts it, never narrates it.
